violations.text: Pasta prepared the day prior was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The following were observed not in good repair: -prep table in service area. PIC stated he is repairing today. -prep unit gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The floor in the kitchen/service area is in poor repair. Inspector observed cracks, buckling, missing pieces of laminate. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. FMC has expired and must re-instate. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (stand mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Pasta was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Per staff, pasta was prepared yesterday morning. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement storage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The following were observed not in good repair: -prep table in service area (propped by a used can) -cola refrigerator door handle missing -prep unit gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the table under the grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floor and wall behind the grill has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC stated that they have scheduled a deep clean for 12/8. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Inspector observed cracks, buckling, and missing pieces of laminate. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen, prep room, and bathroom were lacking paper towels. PIC brought paper towel to the kitchen hand sink during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Units were taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Cheese was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Inspector observed container filled above the fill line, cheese over fill line was placed under fill line to maintain temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Deli meats and cooked pasta were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Thawed desserts were not marked with the date they were thawed. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2022
Cases of fryer oil were observed stored on the floor in the prep room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The following were observed not in good repair: -prep table in front service area (propped with a used can) -cola refrigerator handle missing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -gaskets on refrigeration and prep unit doors -table top under grill -slicer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floor and wall behind the grill has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Inspector observed cracks, buckling, and missing pieces of laminate. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
